name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Arlington, TX — Primo Personal Loans at 427 E Lamar Blvd offers fast personal loan approvals and flexible terms.
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans is located at 427 E Lamar Blvd Suite 110 in Arlington, TX. This standalone location serves Arlington residents looking for personal loan solutions. The branch is open Monday through Friday from 7 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for both working professionals and weekend shoppers in the Arlington area.

At this Arlington location, Primo Personal Loans offers personalized loan consultations, loan applications, and support throughout the funding process. Whether you need a loan for debt consolidation, home improvements, or unexpected expenses, the team at 427 E Lamar Blvd can guide you through your options. Call +1 682-281-2969 to speak with a loan specialist at the Arlington branch.

If you're an Arlington resident considering a personal loan, bring your government-issued ID, recent pay stubs, and bank statements to your appointment—this speeds up the application process. Visit during business hours at the E Lamar Blvd location to discuss your loan needs in person with experienced loan officers.
address: 427 E Lamar Blvd Suite 110, Arlington, TX 76011

company_info.headquarters: 427 E Lamar Blvd Suite 110, Arlington, TX 76011

pros: No hard credit inquiry—application does not affect FICO scores
Fast express quotes available online without requiring full application first
Wide loan range ($100–$5,000) accessible to consumers with varying urgent needs
SSL and TSL security encryption for online application safety
Simple online application process designed for speed
Accessible website features for users with assistive technology needs
Clear compliance with federal identification and anti-money-laundering regulations
cons: Website location page (Memphis) returns 404 error, indicating broken infrastructure
No APR, fees, or specific repayment terms disclosed on the accessible website
Non-traditional credit reporting may negatively impact borrower profile outside FICO system
Up to 2 business days required for verification before fund release, contradicting 'express' positioning
Limited geographic availability—loan access varies significantly by state
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs ($100–$5,000) who want fast quotes
Borrowers concerned about hard credit inquiries and credit score impact
Applicants in states where Primo's lending is available who can wait 1–2 business days for funding
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best suited for consumers seeking fast access to $100–$5,000 in emergency cash without a hard credit pull, though they should verify state availability and understand that "express" processing may still require 1–2 business days post-application. The broken website infrastructure and lack of transparent APR/fee disclosure are material concerns for informed comparison shopping.
services: Free loan quote tool (no application required)
Accessibility accommodations for assistive technology users
meta_description: Arlington, TX — Primo Personal Loans at 427 E Lamar Blvd offers fast personal loan approvals and flexible terms.
